gist: This project should remain a local-only Codex CLI memory harness and should not pursue server or MCP-server integration.

evidence_refs.quote_or_summary: 서버를 사용을 안하는 방향이긴해 그래서 나중에 MCP 서버화 이두개도 고려를 안하고 있어

why_keep: This captures a durable project direction that should guide future architecture, prompts, runtime helpers, and CLI design decisions.
